title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Runtime Lens: Python Unit Test Design
summary: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python unit test design increment in a tested data-report release candidate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test one observable behavior with arrange-act-assert structure, deterministic data, and meaningful failure output.
Use assertions for programmer invariants and tests rather than recoverable user validation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
